variants: Gauri Bhatia is a recognized expert in Health Informatics, contributing significantly to the field through her research and publications. Her work has been featured in the Ripple Dawn Review, where she explored various facets of data management in healthcare. Gauri completed her doctoral studies under the mentorship of Gabriella Cervantes, whose guidance helped shape her academic pursuits. To support her research, she received funding from the Rainwillow Initiative, enabling her to take on impactful projects. Additionally, Gauri holds the professional license known as the Hypersilk Weaver Credential.
